codeReview.summary: Manual scrutiny review found the corrections/control recovery packet stayed tightly aligned to PR #99, and the current propagated stack now carries that reviewed work on reachable descendant commit `09dc2b8bf301613f0dd9ca456d55f3c50abedbbd` (`fix(accounting): close PR #99 stale review threads`) instead of the stale pre-restack closure id. That reachable current-stack anchor preserves the earlier migration/R2 closure plus the legacy replay, reversal provenance, supplier-settlement, and purchase-return follow-ups that kept the branch review-clean.

summary: Pass. Corrections/control replay, provenance, and migration-governance recovery work remains auditable on branch-reachable commit `09dc2b8bf301613f0dd9ca456d55f3c50abedbbd`, which is the current propagated descendant of the earlier closure packet.
